sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n76992" key="pali/rropos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πᾰλίρ-ροπος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n76992.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">toltering, bent</tr_>, <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">π. γόνυ</foreign> (of an old man) ib.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0006.tlg012.perseus-grc1:492" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">492</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
